detail.reason: Charter fails the name-swap test (all generic filler below the placeholder floor) and duplicates growth, which already owns copy/content/positioning; rationale is speculative naming ('would be useful for future work') with no real work growth can't already do — either fold into growth or give it a judgment posture growth demonstrably lacks.

Distinct account-operator identity (account standing as scarce resource, abort-vs-retry rule, evidence-not-effort) that builder's maker-posture lacks despite same tools; rationale is concrete and current — final-mile marketplace listing has no owner and is the blocking step of the live objective.
